title: Autoglym Instant Tyre Dressing, 500ml
features: Spray-on tyre care solution can leave you with a gloss or satin finish, whichever you prefer
Contains polymer silicone protectants to transform your tyres walls from old to new
Can be applied to wet or dry tyre walls
For best performance, ensure the side wall of the tyre is free of dirt and old coatings so the dressing has maximum contact with the rubber
Warning: do not use on motorcycle tyres
description: From the manufacturer Transforms Dull Tyres Instant Tyre Dressing contains durable polymer silicone protectants that transform your tyres from looking old to new. Easy to Use Simply spray our fast and effective tyre dressing to wet or dry tyre walls. Light Sheen Finish Generously apply Instant Tyre dressing to your tyre walls and leave to dry for a light sheen finish. Matte Finish For a matte finish, remove the excess with a microfibre cloth.
